race.description: Sportsbet Adelaide Cup Day Monday 9 March Handicap
race.comment: NEXTONIXS (9) closed off nicely here fresh when beaten narrowly by MINTULEE, who she now meets 1.5kgs better. Is sure to have come on from that and boasts a strong record over this track and trip. Draws to get all the favours and keeps Milnes. Sure to give a sight. DAISYDOO (6) scored a much-deserved win last start at headquarters. Is ticking along nicely and can go on with it now that she's found winning form. BEEN OUR ANGEL (3) gave another bold sight last time, only to fade late. Meets a couple of his rivals with a significant weight swing and is sure to give another sight in front. Don't overlook. MINTULEE (2) had their measure at the latest but faces a stiffer test this time with the weight swing, worth keeping onside though.
